name: Columns Grid
description: This block displays a grid layout with flipping cards. The front of the card will be separated from the back by inserting a ‘---’ (<hr> element) inside every table cell. The cards support 4 sizes and grow relatively to the other cards. You add the size by inserting a p element with this text content at the top of every card: size-number-card. (number: 1 trough 4).

fields.name: rows
fields.description: Author this block using the row/column table structure documented in the sidekick block page and its examples.

ambiguityNotes: This entry was expanded from the sidekick block docs and local source file path, but the exact authoring table/row structure should still be taken from the documented examples when generating DOCX content.
